title: Individual Psychotherapy
description: One-on-one therapy for anxiety, depression, grief, trauma, and life transitions.

title: Child and Adolescent therapy
description: Support for children and adolescents navigating emotional distress, relationships, identity, and school stress.

title: Psychological Assessments
description: Structured clinical assessments to understand and address concerns clearly.

title: Workshops
description: Group learning sessions on mental health topics for organizations, schools, and communities.

title: Internships
description: Structured training and mentorship for psychology students and early-career professionals.

title: Supervision
description: Reflective supervision for mental health professionals and trainees.
